---
title: "Henderson Vo"
toc: false
image: images/headshot.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/hendersonvo
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/henderson-vo-a1b712275
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:hendersonvo@ucsb.edu
---

### Welcome!

My name is Henderson and I'm happy you're here! This website is meant to act as a personal portfolio. Feel free to browse and learn more about my work.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

I am currently studying at UC Santa Barbara to earn my bachelor's in Environmental Studies and Statistics & Data Science. In September 2025, I joined the [Bren-Environmental Studies Fellows](https://bren.ucsb.edu/undergrad-mentoring/bren-es-fellows-program/bren-es-fellows/henderson-vo) program. I also worked in Dr. Kelly Caylor's [Water, Vegetation, & Society (WAVES) Lab](https://www.waveslab.org/) in the Bren School of Environmental Science and Management.

My work revolves around quantitative ecology and climate resilience. If you would like to connect, feel free to reach out via email.
